# Summary

One-paragraph description of what this Initiative will accomplish.

## Linked PRD

`docs/prds/<slug>.md` — required. An Initiative without a PRD is just an Epic.

## Strategic Context

Why this work, why now. Reference the PRD's "Why now" section.

## Success Metrics

The observable outcomes that define success. Copy or summarize from the PRD's "Success metrics" section.

- Metric 2:

## Time Horizon

When does this Initiative start, and when do we expect it to be complete (or to be re-evaluated)?

- Start:
- Target completion / next review:

- Sponsor:
